paper_title: From Uncertainty to Actionability: Fisher-Geometric Accessibility in Neural Representations
purpose: Paper-facing run index for the main ICML/NeurIPS submission. This file lists only the experiments and controls used to support the main paper claim.

main_claim.short: rho(B) measures route-dependent Fisher-geometric accessibility of the current uncertainty direction.
main_claim.expanded: rho(B) is not a generic uncertainty score. It measures how much of the current Fisher-weighted uncertainty direction is locally reachable through an internal route or subspace B, and can be used to guide route-level intervention and fixed-budget allocation.

main_experiments.name: matched_scalar_uncertainty
main_experiments.claim: Accessibility is not determined by scalar uncertainty.
main_experiments.paper_section: Accessibility is not determined by scalar uncertainty

main_experiments.name: local_perturbation_prediction
main_experiments.claim: rho predicts local entropy and varentropy movement under small representation perturbations.

main_experiments.name: equal_output_uncertainty_steering
main_experiments.claim: High-rho routes move uncertainty under matched output-motion controls.
main_experiments.paper_section: Accessibility selects routes that move uncertainty

main_experiments.name: choose_route_intervention
main_experiments.claim: rho selects routes that move entropy and varentropy more than low-rho, random, gradient-orthogonal, and matched-output controls.
main_experiments.paper_section: Accessibility selects routes that move uncertainty

main_experiments.name: budgeted_controllability_allocation
main_experiments.claim: Adding rho improves fixed-budget safe uncertainty movement selection over matched policies without rho.

appendix_controls.name: gradient_baselines
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Shows that direct gradients are strong baselines for raw movement; rho should be interpreted as route-relative accessibility, not a universal gradient replacement.

appendix_controls.name: full_regression_controls
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Tests residual rho signal after scalar uncertainty, gradients, model, layer, task, route family, and subspace controls.

appendix_controls.name: semantic_preservation
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Tracks top-1 preservation, top-k neighborhood overlap, and output drift under interventions.

appendix_controls.name: topk_robustness
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Checks robustness of rho and movement summaries to monitored top-k/top-m choices.

appendix_controls.name: fisher_output_energy_control
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Tests whether rho effects persist under matched Fisher-output movement.

appendix_controls.name: statistical_diagnostics
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Checks same-scalar uncertainty and gradient-magnitude alternatives.

appendix_controls.name: scale_external_robustness
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Documents model and family coverage, including limitations.

appendix_controls.name: minimal_intervention_energy
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Supporting evidence for intervention efficiency; not the main downstream claim.

appendix_controls.name: controllability_mapping_support
appendix_controls.claim_scope: Diagnostic controllability mapping and route-selection support; the main paper-facing downstream claim is budgeted allocation.

not_main_claims.name: rho_guided_selective_reliability
not_main_claims.reason: Auxiliary reliability feature; not a main claim.

not_main_claims.name: non_nlp_safety_policies
not_main_claims.reason: Boundary/stress test; not a main claim.

not_main_claims.name: llm_equal_cost_review_policy
not_main_claims.reason: Equal-cost review-policy stress test; separate from route-level controllability allocation.

statistics_policy.main_text: Report compact aggregate effects and confidence intervals for main decision-facing tests.
statistics_policy.repository: Keep fold summaries, paired bootstrap intervals, permutation tests, FDR-adjusted q-values, configs, reports, and deterministic samples where full records exceed file-size limits.
statistics_policy.large_files: Full selected-record tables may be generated by reproduction scripts and omitted from git when they exceed GitHub file-size limits.

claims_to_avoid: rho is a generic error predictor
rho is a universal replacement for gradients
rho is a broad safety score
rho improves accuracy whenever uncertainty is moved
